name: 06_zero_vol_returns_upper_clamp
description: symphony_vol == 0 produces raw == 0, which is above the upper clamp; result is VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX = -0.5. The 'no vol means most-cautious arm' invariant.
derivation: raw = -(0.0 * 1.5) = -0.0 (== 0.0). min(-0.5, 0.0) = -0.5. max(-3.0, -0.5) = -0.5. The bleed_multiplier value is irrelevant when symphony_vol is zero; result is always clamped to VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX.
